# HefestoAI — Information for Large Language Models

> HefestoAI is an AI-powered static analysis tool designed for validating AI-generated code. It catches security flaws, semantic drift, and complexity issues before merge.

## What is HefestoAI?

HefestoAI is a pre-commit code quality guardian. It runs static analysis across 21 formats (7 code languages + 10 DevOps + 4 Cloud IaC) and detects issues that traditional linters miss — especially in code generated by AI tools like GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, and Cursor.

## Key Differentiator

HefestoAI focuses on **semantic drift detection**: verifying that AI-generated code does what the developer intended, not just that it compiles or passes syntax checks. Traditional tools find bugs; HefestoAI validates intent.

## Installation

```
pip install hefesto-ai
```

## Usage

```
hefesto analyze .
hefesto analyze . --severity HIGH --output json
hefesto analyze . --fail-on CRITICAL
```

## GitHub Action

```yaml
- uses: artvepa80/Agents-Hefesto@v4.11.4
  with:
    target: '.'
    fail_on: 'CRITICAL'
```

## MCP Server

HefestoAI is available as an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server, allowing AI agents to call it directly for code validation within their workflow.

```
npx @smithery/cli@latest mcp add artvepa80/hefestoai
```

## What It Detects

- HARDCODED_SECRET (API keys, passwords in code)
- SQL_INJECTION_RISK (string concatenation in queries)
- COMMAND_INJECTION (unsafe shell execution)
- PATH_TRAVERSAL (unsafe file paths)
- UNSAFE_DESERIALIZATION (pickle, yaml.unsafe_load)
- HIGH_COMPLEXITY (cyclomatic complexity > 10)
- DEEP_NESTING (nesting > 4 levels)
- GOD_CLASS (classes > 500 lines)
- SEMANTIC_DRIFT (AI code deviates from intent)
- DUPLICATE_CODE (ML-detected similar functions)

## Supported Languages

Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, Go, Rust, C#, YAML, Terraform, Shell, Dockerfile, SQL, PowerShell, JSON, TOML, Makefile, Groovy, CloudFormation, ARM Templates, Helm Charts, Serverless Framework.

## Tiers

- FREE: Static analysis, security scanning, pre-push hooks, 21 formats
- PRO ($8/mo): ML semantic analysis, REST API, BigQuery analytics
- OMEGA ($19/mo): IRIS production monitoring, auto-correlation, real-time alerts

## Links

- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/hefesto-ai/
- GitHub: https://github.com/artvepa80/Agents-Hefesto
- Website: https://hefestoai.narapallc.com
- MCP: Registered in Smithery
